negative: Cause: Outlook credential cache was corrupted. Fix: Cleared credential cache and re-added account.

anchor: Outlook keeps asking for password
positive: Cause: stale local credentials in Outlook. Fix: clearing cached credentials and signing in again.
negative: Cause: Security group not applied. Fix: Applied required security group, restored access.

anchor: Unable to log into account due to lockout
positive: Cause: Account locked after too many attempts. Fix: Account unlocked by IT.
negative: Cause: Incorrect group membership. Fix: Added correct access group to account and folder opened.

anchor: Printer jobs stuck in queue
positive: Cause: Local printer mapping stale. Fix: Clear print queue and reinstall printer mapping.
negative: Cause: Security group not applied. Fix: Applied required security group and restored access.

anchor: Cannot open department shared drive due to permission issue
positive: Cause: Security group not applied. Fix: Applied required security group, restored access.
negative: Cause: Printer queue was full and mapping needed reinstallation. Fix: Cleared the queue and reinstalled printer mapping; printing succeeded.

anchor: Reset link invalid and expired.
positive: Cause: Previous reset token had expired. Fix: Issued new reset email and removed expired token from account.
negative: Cause: Printer queue was full and mapping needed reinstallation. Fix: Cleared the queue and reinstalled printer mapping; printing succeeded.

anchor: Outlook mailbox not loading
positive: Cause: Stale local credentials in Outlook. Fix: Cleared Outlook credential cache and re-added account.
negative: Cause: Incorrect group membership. Fix: Added correct access group.

anchor: Permission denied accessing shared team folder
positive: Cause: Access group not correctly assigned. Fix: Added correct access group to account.
negative: Cause: Outdated VPN profile. Fix: Updated and reconnected with new profile.

anchor: Email inbox not loading in Outlook desktop.
positive: Cause: Stale local credentials in Outlook. Fix: Cleared Outlook credential cache and re-added account.
negative: Cause: Account locked due to too many failed login attempts. Fix: IT cleared the lockout and confirmed account authentication.

anchor: Printing jobs stuck, printer appears offline.
positive: Cause: Local printer mapping stale. Fix: Removed and re-added the printer.
negative: Cause: VPN profile expired. Fix: Updated and reconnected with new profile, resolved the issue.

anchor: Account says locked, preventing access.
positive: Cause: Account was locked. Fix: Account unlocked and user able to sign in.
negative: Cause: Local printer mapping stale. Fix: Removed and re-added the printer.

anchor: Password reset link invalid
positive: Cause: Previous reset token expired. Fix: Generated fresh password reset link.
negative: Cause: Cached credentials were invalid. Fix: Clear cached credentials and sign in again.

anchor: Cannot connect to VPN from home after authentication failure.
positive: Cause: Outdated VPN profile. Fix: Updated profile and reconnected with it, successfully connected.
negative: Cause: account locked due to too many failed login attempts. Fix: account unlocked by IT support.

anchor: Account locked despite correct password.
positive: Cause: Account lockout detected. Fix: Account unlocked, allowing login.
negative: Cause: Outlook credential cache was cleared and account re-added. Fix: The mailbox now loads correctly.

negative: Cause: Outdated VPN client profile. Fix: Updated profile and reconnected successfully.

negative: Cause: Additional related setting not applied. Fix: Correct access group added to account and folder opened.
